title: DC DENTAL CARE CLINIC
address: 10, Jalan PJU 5/16, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Nurul Aini
reviews.text: The doctor was very kind and helpful. Even though I couldn’t proceed with the FRC treatment, the explanation given about other options was clear. Thank you.

reviews.name: Prassetyo Adhi Cahyono
reviews.text: Good dental, humble doctor,good service and affordable

reviews.name: Nazz Atien
reviews.text: Dah survey beberapa klinik, klinik ni antara harga paling berpatutan. Buat rawatan dengan seorang doktor perempuan melayu. Sangat bagus, doc bagi penerangan dengan baik & rawatan semua sangat berpuas hati. Terima kasih. Servis terbaik 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.name: kelvin lee
reviews.text: Service good,clinic clean,everything good 👍👍👍

reviews.text: Good experiences.

description:
DC Dental Care Clinic stands out in Selangor for its commitment to accessible dental health and comprehensive services tailored for the community. This facility offers an inviting atmosphere where patients feel comfortable discussing their dental concerns, ensuring that each visit is a personalized experience that prioritizes individual needs.

The clinic showcases modern equipment and a team of skilled professionals dedicated to delivering high-quality care. Patients have noted the professionalism of the staff, remarking on their kindness and willingness to explain treatment options clearly. Affordable services have also emerged as a key highlight, making essential dental care available to more residents in the area.

Recent feedback reflects a generally positive experience with the clinic, praising the simple approach to treatment and affordability. While some patients had specific concerns about their treatments not proceeding, their overall satisfaction with the guidance provided indicates a strong rapport between staff and visitors. Conveniently located on Jalan PJU 5/16, the clinic is easily accessible for those in the surrounding neighborhoods seeking reliable dental services.

reviews.name: Sandy Chai
reviews.text: The dentist was skillful enough to manually adjust my new mouthguard so that it would be more comfortable for me. Recently there is an influx of young self-employed dentists and i dont think they are skillful enough to fix mouthguards given my situation. Respectfully yours, Jassy Chai (customer for over 10 yrs)

reviews.name: YanasegarK kanesan
reviews.text: Excellent service by Dr. Uma. Very professional, gentle, and caring. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Ooi J N
reviews.text: Dr Thiru is not only skilful he is kind and compassionate.  A trusted dentist. He makes me feel at ease.

reviews.name: Choo-Boon Saw
reviews.text: My wife was introduced to Dr Thiru. She’s doing some implants. Very professional and his clinic is equipped with all the latest equipment. Very good workmanship with minimal discomfort and pain.

reviews.text: Very expert & knowledgeable. The level of service is also very astounding considering the fact that I'm in so much pain and need urgent treatment of root canal whereby all places require observing first before able to take actions. Totally recommended for everyone!

title: Klinik Soo
address: 175-E, Jalan SS 2/24, Taman Sea, 47300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: daniel lau
reviews.text: Doctor talks too much. Fee and medicine are crazy high. RM200 for flu. Btw they are open everyday 9am to 12.30pm. I think the next door clinics are better in terms of service and reasonable charges vis-a-vis medicine dispensed. Parking after 9am is a challenge.

reviews.name: Osaison Nainai
reviews.text: One of the best doctors in town.

reviews.name: SS •サンドラ
reviews.text: Always a pleasant visit to this clinic! A very knowledgeable doctor that shall diagnose you exactly and teach how to take the medications accordingly. Staffs are also very friendly and kind. Although the interior is slightly old, do not let that deter you as this clinic has apparently been running well for many years. I have been told that prices are apparently "high" but they are all reasonably-priced + are genuine-quality medicine. Consultation price are appropriate too.

reviews.name: App
reviews.text: Polite staff and doctor. But medicines are very expensive, seems a lot higher than recommended retail prices for meds. Close to RM200 for simple treatment. Plus point hardly any queue

reviews.name: Sikatsoo
reviews.text: Multilingual (English, Cantonese, Hokkien, ...), knowledgeable and friendly doctor, Chinese female receptionists are also very detail-oriented and friendly too!

reviews.name: Jocey
reviews.text: Doctor is very knowledgeable, he is patient and explains your sickness causes and remedy. Also shows you how to use certain medication. However I got charged rm280 for just antibiotics for flu 😅 service good but price is not reasonable at all. I could easily get same medication at a way lower price!

description:
Klinik Soo stands out for its commitment to patient-centric healthcare in Selangor, where accessibility meets expertise. title: Jaya Dental Surgery, PJ33
address: PJ33, Ground Floor, PG_13A, Jalan Professor Khoo Kay Kim, Section 13, 46200 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: XY Chong
reviews.text:
I’ve been terrified of visiting the dentist ever since I was a kid, but Dr. Eileen completely changed that for me. She was so gentle, patient, and attentive throughout the whole procedure, and kept checking in to make sure I was comfortable.

My filling was quite a complex one, so I had to keep my mouth open for a long time. Even so, I felt much less discomfort than I have at some other dental clinics in the past. Dr. Eileen’s skill and caring approach really made a huge difference. Bravo to her assistant too, who was equally patient!

A big thank you to Dr. Eileen and the entire team for being so professional, friendly, and welcoming. They turned what used to be a stressful experience into a surprisingly comfortable one. Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.name: AO
reviews.text: I’ve been a patient here since I was 4 years old, and I wouldn't go anywhere else. The service is consistently excellent, and they always prioritise patient comfort. They have the ability to balance the essential dental needs with what the patient actually wants. Absolute professionals.

reviews.name: Wong Oiyoo
reviews.text: Dental filling job is excellent. Service provided by dentist is with utmost care and attention. Counter service is also very good. Highly recommended!!

reviews.name: Ivan Koh
reviews.text: Excellent care from Dr. Eileen and her wonderful team! Everyone was attentive and made the visit stress-free.

reviews.name: Nadhirah Zulkifli
reviews.text:
Goods docter Jaya n more likes mom to advise me.. Treet me like she dougther
My treatment meant cabut gigi😊😘

title: Ng Dental Surgery
address: 25 A, Jalan SS 21/37, Damansara Utama, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Jo Too
reviews.text: Fixed my teeth :D

reviews.name: Max Lim
reviews.text: I took my sister here for her 1/2 yearly check up. Doctor Ng has been our family dentist for many years. He is very professional n thorough. He checked n cleaned my sister's teeth. For her there's no new cavity for any fillings to be done. There's no decay too. So her scaling only cost her RM 150 only. Many years ago it only cost RM90-RM 95. Then as years go by , it slowly increased to RM 100- RM 150. Is this due to inflation in Malaysia?

reviews.name: Bee Leng Leong
reviews.text: This morning I went to this clinic in uptown for my half yearly dental check up with Doctor Ng , my family dentist for more than 10 years. He’s patient n when he extracts your tooth, he can do so without much pain. He will also show you the extracted tooth n jokingly ask you whether you want to keep . He checked n cleaned my teeth . After that he X- rayed my molar n discovered that I needed to fill up 4 molars for me. He showed me the X- ray. Then he started doing the needful for me. He then advised me not to eat for an hour. Then only eat something soft n not to bite or chew any hard foodstuff. This will protect the fillings better n longer. So I came back n ate taufufah which I bought from the shop on my way home. Luckily my 4 molars could be saved in time cos I never like using dentures.

reviews.name: CL Hor
reviews.text: An honest dentist, no nonsense, no up selling. Tells u your options, pros and cons and the associated costs. No frills clinic, If u r looking for a fancy clinic w hot coffee and tea w a doctor who smooth talks to u, u will not get it here.  He is honest, doesn't sugar coat his explanations but always give u the best option and value.

reviews.name: Jo Too
reviews.text: Best dentist

description:
In the vibrant heart of Selangor, Ng Dental Surgery stands out as a respected choice for dental care and oral surgery, seamlessly blending clinical excellence with a local touch. title: SEPA Dental Clinic (TTDI
address: B-1-11, TTDI Plaza, Jalan Wan Kadir 3, Jln Damansara, Taman Tun Dr Ismail, 60000 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

reviews.name: syimir afandi
reviews.text:
Had a great experience at Sepa Dental. Dr. Samantha was very nice, professional, and helpful throughout the treatment.

They even provided hot tea as a welcoming drink, which was such a nice touch. With the relaxing ambience, it honestly feels more like a spa than a dental clinic!

During the treatment, they provide VR goggles and headphones so you can enjoy Netflix, YouTube, and other entertainment, making the whole experience much more comfortable and enjoyable.

I also loved the ambience of the clinic—clean, modern, and welcoming. Definitely a pleasant dental visit. Will come again! 😊

reviews.name: Yousuf Ali Shihab Shihab
reviews.text: “Excellent service! The dentist was very kind, gentle, and professional. The staff were friendly, and the clinic was clean and comfortable. Highly recommended!”

reviews.name: Rahima Ibrahim
reviews.text: Great service and Professional Dentist treating customers with care and patience.

reviews.name: Nerson chua
reviews.text: I would like to highly recommend Dr. Kung for their exceptional service. The dental cleaning was performed with great care and precision. Furthermore, Dr. Kung provided comprehensive guidance on dental health and demonstrated a high level of professional responsibility."

reviews.name: Nur idzumi mohamed hasnan
reviews.text: Thank you SEPA dental for the wonderful service..First time went to a dentist that feels like a spa..very relaxing..they even gave you welcoming tea..special thank you to Dr Samantha, Fara and Amani❤️❤️..they were very friendly! now they have special promo for scaling. Highly  recommended..thanks again❤️❤️

reviews.name: Breezy Clean
reviews.text: Dr Huixian is very patience to young kid! I signed up my young boy for myobrace when he was 9 year old, it has tremendously improve his appearance and he is now having a very sweet smile!

reviews.name: May Wong
reviews.text: Huge thanks to the team here for squeezing me in last minute for a scale and polish! Dr. Eve was amazing. I had a bunch of questions, and she explained everything so thoroughly without making me feel rushed. She even shared her own experience with helping patients with crowns and wisdom teeth issues, which gave me a lot of clarity. Super grateful for the great care!

reviews.name: Cheok Gheen Law
reviews.text:
Edit : Feeling disappointed that my guns receded after  chronic infection after a crown.. where Dr. Chan advised me to keep brushing to keep gums clean  and I had to endure over 8months of pus filled gums and swelling.

I went to another dentist to have a root canal and my misery was instantly resolved. Didn't get a satisfactory answer even after I called to give feedback.

Dr Yoong is Great dentist with a passion for his trade... Experienced and friendly. Takes time to answer all your questions....

reviews.name: James Leong Wan Kai
reviews.text: I have good experience with this Dental Clinic with Dr Clio who is meticulous enough to handle my teeth periodically and maintain teeth healthiness, not to forget she is patience and gentle to patients. The clinic is well setup, clean and with kids playing area while waiting for servicing.

reviews.name: Fatin Aleeya
reviews.text: Best experience buat filling dengan Dr Clio. Doktor sangat baik, ceria dan friendly. Tempat pun selesa. Rawatan dibuat dengan lembut dan profesional, tak rasa takut langsung.Highly recommended! ❤️😙

reviews.name: Mia Kamal
reviews.text: The drs are really kind, Dr Clio explained in detail about the process of my procedure and she made sure to always check if I was okay. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Xue Yee Chok
reviews.text:
Had a really good experience at White Density Dentistry Clinic in Jaya One with Dr Clio. Dr Clio is very gentle, friendly, patient, and experienced. She always prioritised my comfort throughout the treatment and explained everything clearly.
I did scaling and filling here, and both procedures were surprisingly comfortable and smooth. The clinic itself is new, clean, modern, and very well equipped, including convenient in-house X-ray services. There is also ample parking right at the doorstep.
What impressed me most is that despite the excellent service and environment, the pricing is still very reasonable. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a caring and professional dental clinic in PJ!

reviews.name: Seng Han Ho
reviews.text: Dr. Clio is kind, friendly, very professional, and always upbeat during early appointments even though she confesses she usually isn't a morning person. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Hazeem Halin
reviews.text: Have been with Dr Gwen since before Covid time. Always have a very good experience considering that i don’t like going to the dentist.

reviews.name: Timothy Leong Yew Jo
reviews.text: Bad service

reviews.name: joanne chow
reviews.text:
My recent experience with Dr Laura Lau has been such a pleasant one. I find Dr Laura Lau to be very thorough and professional in her approach and assessment on the overall condition/problem of my teeth/gums. FYI my molar tooth cracked and fallen off with barely any of my original tooth left.  Dr Laura after assessing, takes her time to explain and discuss the kind of treatments she will do. She is also very meticulous and skilful in the execution of the treatment, be it….drilling, scaling, polishing, on lay and even laser off part of my gums throughout the process. The best part is there was minimal discomfort and pain!!! Very steady hands and sharp.

I went home pleased that I have come to the right doctor. She will be my to go to dentist from now on and for my family for sure.

I would recommend you to see Dr Laura Lau if you are as fussy as me and looking for a doctor for your dental care/health who is not only highly skilful but kind and patient to top it all!

Joanne

reviews.name: Ona
reviews.text: Dr. Joe has been my dentist for a few years. She is wonderful! She is very thorough and professional and really takes the time to explain any issues carefully to ensure I have proper understanding. She is also very cheerful and friendly and makes every visit a pleasant experience. All the staff I have encountered have been super pleasant and professional. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Pluviophile
reviews.text: Recommended ! Love the way Dr Laura explained everything before start with the treatment, and she also very gentle. Friendly staffs Yati & Nurul are really helpful! ❤️

reviews.name: Jenny Wong
reviews.text: Dr. Joe is my Dentist and I trust her skill and knowledge. She is very kind  helpful, friendly young and pretty Dentist

reviews.name: Lena Chow
reviews.text: Did an inlay with Dr Laura today  , is so comfortable and fit so well .. not only that both nurses are very friendly helpful and passionate with their work .. overall clinic  has a very conducive environment  ..good job Dr Laura and Dr Ong  and nurse Yati and Nurul❤️

description:

Its strategic location amidst bustling neighborhoods ensures that quality dental care is always within reach, allowing families easy access to essential services. This blend of community focus and professional integrity fosters trust, creating lasting patient relationships.

description:
Located strategically in the heart of Selangor, Denzwell Dental Surgery stands out as a key player in the region’s dental care landscape. This facility is easily accessible for residents seeking comprehensive dental services, from routine check-ups to advanced cosmetic procedures, underscoring its commitment to enhancing oral health within the community.

Patients often commend the professionalism of the team, highlighting their expertise and attentive care. However, some have expressed concerns regarding pricing relative to similar options nearby, indicating an area for potential improvement. Constructive feedback is welcomed by the staff, who strive to refine patient experience while maintaining high standards of dental excellence.

Denzwell Dental Surgery operates Monday through Saturday, offering flexible hours to accommodate varied schedules. By intertwining advanced dental techniques with a welcoming environment, this facility aims to foster lasting relationships grounded in trust and quality, ensuring every visit is a step towards better oral health.

title: Klinik Pergigian Kheng (Uptown)

reviews.name: shavinnal laxmi
reviews.text: Gave free hook for my invisalign alongside some toothpaste. My daughter’s bracket broke twice but Dr Adib replaced it for free both times.

reviews.name: Eunice
reviews.text: Good experience here. The environment is good, doctor is nice. I like it here

reviews.name: Elisa Ho

description:
Located in the vibrant Uptown area of Selangor, Klinik Pergigian Kheng offers a comprehensive range of dental services tailored to meet individual patient needs. Open six days a week with extended hours on weekdays, Klinik Pergigian Kheng is easily accessible for families in the community. title: Klinik Pergigian Dr. Siew
address: 21(A, Jalan 21/12, Sea Park, 46300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Wei Earn Lee
reviews.text: Dr Siew is patience and detailed. Price is reasonable too. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Bryle Edward Unggos
reviews.text: I have tooth extraction twice to dr siew but he never disappoint me. He explained to me what we need to do, advise and consultation. Very considerate dr and good price and not expensive also very professional and humble. ❤️❤️

reviews.name: Sathiah Sarveetha
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Dr.Siew  at Klinik Pergigian sea park. The clinic was clean, well-organized, and welcoming. Dr. Siew was very gentle and explained every step of the procedure clearly, which helped ease my anxiety.
I highly recommend this clinic if you’re looking for a dentist who truly cares about patient comfort and dental health. I will definitely come back for future treatments.

reviews.name: Evelyn Tan
reviews.text: I did scaling and Dr Siew was very details and did a very thorough job.

reviews.name: Ching kim Lim
reviews.text: I went for thooth extraction. He is a very gentle doctor. Newly renovated place, clean and comfortable. Discount for senior citizen. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Siew Ying
reviews.text: Dr. Siew is a very good and gentle doctor. He provided a detailed explanation of the condition of my tooth and did a painless tooth filling treatment for me!

description:
Klinik Pergigian Dr. Siew stands as a trusted dental care facility in Selangor, specializing in personalized oral treatments that cater to every patient’s needs. Renowned for meticulous attention to detail, Dr. Siew ensures that each consultation is thorough, often highlighting the importance of patient education in his approach, making complex procedures accessible and understandable.

Patients describe their experiences as reassuring and professional, with many expressing gratitude for Dr. Siew's patience during treatments like tooth extractions. The clinic itself boasts a clean and organized environment, emphasizing safety and comfort during visits. Accessibility is also a strong point; conveniently located, it attracts residents eager for reliable dental care in their neighborhood.

This facility is more than just a dental clinic; it serves as a crucial healthcare resource within the community, nurturing long-term relationships through consistent quality care. As one patient noted, "the prices are reasonable," reflecting the facility's commitment to providing value alongside expertise. For those in Selangor seeking comprehensive dental solutions, Klinik Pergigian Dr. Siew presents a compelling choice.

title: Resmile Dental

street: T312 & 313, Level 3, The Starling, 6, Jalan SS21/37
description:
Resmile Dental stands out in Selangor for its commitment to comprehensive dental care, specializing in preventive, restorative, and cosmetic dentistry. Located on the vibrant Level 3 of The Starling, it offers a modern and welcoming environment equipped with cutting-edge technology and skilled practitioners, ensuring patients receive high-quality treatment tailored to their individual needs.

From the moment patients step into the clinic, they experience a seamless journey marked by personalized service and meticulous attention to detail. Services range from routine check-ups to complex procedures, all performed with precision. Patient feedback often highlights the thoroughness of consultations and the calming atmosphere, though some reviews note occasional wait times due to the clinic's popularity, reflecting both its demand and commitment to quality care.

Accessibility is a key advantage of Resmile Dental, situated in a bustling shopping complex that draws locals and visitors alike. This prime location not only facilitates convenience for regular visits but also reinforces Resmile's role as a valued community resource dedicated to enhancing oral health awareness. Whether seeking routine maintenance or cosmetic enhancements, patients can trust in Resmile Dental for an exceptional healthcare experience.

description:
At Le Pavilion Dental Clinic in the bustling hub of Dataran Sunway, dental health takes precedence through a commitment to patient-centric care. Specializing in preventive and cosmetic dentistry, the clinic offers a range of services, from routine scaling and polishing to advanced whitening treatments. Patients consistently praise the friendly demeanor of the staff, emphasizing an atmosphere that prioritizes comfort and approachability.

The patient journey begins with personalized consultations, where experienced professionals provide tailored advice and treatment plans. Recent testimonials reveal satisfaction with the clinic's clean environment and attentive service; one patient noted, "Had a great experience here for scaling, polishing, and whitening." The clinic is dedicated to building trust within the community, ensuring that each interaction fosters a welcoming experience.

Accessible to residents in Selangor, Le Pavilion Dental Clinic benefits from its convenient location, making dental visits easy amidst busy schedules. With its patient-first philosophy and skilled team, the clinic stands as a reliable choice for comprehensive dental care, contributing significantly to local well-being and oral health awareness.
